form.formComment: Last start finished fourth on April 2 over 375m at Manawatu behind Sunbird Striker, beaten 4.5 lengths (21.43) in a Class 3. Prefer in something easier.

form.formComment: Won his last two including a good win last start over 313m at Wanganui Straight by 0.8 lengths in a Class 2/3. In top form and can make it three straight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a good win last start over 313m at Wanganui Straight by 0.8 lengths in a Class 2/3. In top form and can make it three straight.

form.formComment: Won again in an impressive display to make it two in a row at Wanganui Straight over 313m (17.27). Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again in an impressive display to make it two in a row at Wanganui Straight over 313m (17.27). Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 375m at Manawatu. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 375m at Manawatu. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 5.5 lengths second at Addington but did record a hot 17.10 for the 295m trip. Better last time but not convinced this is his race.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Class 2/3 on April 7 over 313m at Wanganui Straight behind Sunbird Striker beaten 3 lengths (17.34). Has a solid record from this box, including four wins. Leading player.

form.formComment: Recorded a 1.75 lengths win (17.73) in a Class 2 last time at Wanganui Straight. Has five successes and 16 minors from 42 starts from box 8. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Could manage only fourth last time but turned heads the start prior when she recorded a dynamic 21.36 over 375m finishing second at Manawatu. Has claims on best form.
